column1: feedback
I can't log in to my account, it keeps saying invalid credentials even though I know my password is right.
Unable to login since this morning, tried resetting my password twice already.
Login failed again!! This is the third day in a row I can't access my dashboard.
Can't sign in - the app just spins forever on the login screen and then times out.
the app crashes every single time I open the reports tab, completely unusable now
App crashed again while exporting my invoice. Lost all my unsaved changes for the third time this week.
Reports section crashes the app every single time, please fix this ASAP it's blocking my whole team.
Payment failed twice today even though my card has plenty of balance, please help urgently
Tried to pay my subscription three times, got charged but the account still shows unpaid. Need this fixed immediately.
Your billing page shows the wrong currency for my account, I'm being charged in USD instead of EUR
I was charged twice for the same invoice this month, please refund the duplicate charge
Love the new dashboard, so much faster and cleaner than before!
This update is fantastic, the new UI is so much easier to navigate. Great job team!
Customer support was amazing, resolved my issue in five minutes flat. Best support experience I've had in years.
Your support team is incredibly responsive, I emailed at midnight and got a reply within the hour
Really impressed with how polished the onboarding flow feels now, very smooth first-time experience
Been using this for 3 months now, honestly it's been rock solid, no complaints at all, keep up the great work
Oh great, ANOTHER update that breaks the export button. Love it. 10/10 no notes.
Wow, fantastic, the search still can't find anything after 3 updates. Really impressive work team 👏
Sure, let's remove dark mode support right when everyone finally got used to it. Brilliant decision.
Oh perfect timing, the app crashed literally the moment I hit submit on my report. Just perfect.
Bad.
Terrible.
meh
It's fine I guess.
ok
Not great, not terrible.
Could be better.
app bahut slow ho gaya hai after the update 😤😤 please fix asap!!
c'est très lent maintenant, the app takes forever to load after the last update
el botón de exportar no funciona, export button is completely broken on my end
why is notifications aana band ho gaya, I stopped getting any alerts since yesterday
die App stürzt ständig ab when I try to open the dashboard, muy frustrante
Login keeps failing on mobile, also your support team took 5 days to reply, and honestly the pricing page is confusing too.

so I've been using this for like 3 months now and honestly the search feature never finds what I'm looking for, it's really annoying, and also can we PLEASE get dark mode already, every other app has it, oh and one more thing the mobile notifications are super delayed sometimes by hours which defeats the purpose
The export crashes on Safari, billing shows the wrong plan name, and my notifications haven't worked in two weeks. Feels like everything is broken at once lately.
App is slow, the new icons look weird, and I can't find the settings page anymore. Also please add a way to export to Excel not just CSV.
1) crashes on startup sometimes 2) love the new dashboard 3) billing page shows wrong currency
Can we please get dark mode already, every other app has it, my eyes are burning from the white screen at night
Please add dark mode, would really help with eye strain during late night work sessions
Would love to see a dark theme option added, using this at night is rough on the eyes
Can you add bulk export to Excel, not just CSV? Would save me so much manual work every week
It would be great to have SSO support for our enterprise account, we have 200+ employees who need to log in
Please add two-factor authentication, feels risky that my account only needs a password right now
Any plans to build a proper mobile app? The mobile website is really clunky to use on the go
Would be amazing if you added Zapier integration so I can connect this to my other tools
Can we get a way to schedule reports to be emailed weekly instead of manually exporting every time?
How do I change my billing email address? I can't find the option anywhere in settings
Where can I download an invoice for last month's payment? I need it for expense reporting
Is there a way to bulk delete old feedback entries? My dashboard is getting cluttered
Does this integrate with Slack? I want notifications to go straight to our team channel
What's the difference between the Pro and Business plans? The pricing page doesn't explain it clearly
How do I add a teammate to my account, is there a seats limit on the current plan?
I love the new UI, it's so much cleaner!
The new UI is terrible, everything is harder to find now.
Export to CSV works great now, fixed in the latest update
Export to CSV is still completely broken as of today
I love dark mode, finally!
The new dashboard color scheme hurts my eyes, please add a way to change it.
security issue: I noticed I could see another company's data when I searched, this needs to be fixed immediately
Found what looks like a security vulnerability, the API returns other users' feedback if you change the ID in the URL
My account got locked after 3 failed login attempts and now I can't get back in at all, please help urgently
Data loss! I uploaded 500 rows yesterday and now the whole upload has disappeared from my history
URGENT - all our feedback data from the last upload just vanished, this is a critical issue for us
the seach feture doesnt work good, i type stuff and nothing comes up even tho i no its there
cant beleive how buggy this got after teh update, used to work fine b4
noticed a typo on the pricing page, it says 'recieve' instead of 'receive', minor but worth fixing
the dashbord takes forever too load on my laptop, like 10-15 secondss everytime
i think theres somthing wrong with the emial notifications, i never get them anymroe
🔥🔥🔥 amazing update!!
😭😭 why does this keep happening
🐛🐛🐛 bugs everywhere lately
meh, whatever 🤷
Not sure if this is a bug or intentional, but the totals on my dashboard don't match the CSV export numbers
Kind of confused about what this feature is even supposed to do, the tooltip doesn't explain much
I don't really have strong feelings either way about the redesign, it's just... different
Something feels off about the analytics but I can't quite put my finger on what
Not sure if I'm doing something wrong or if this is broken, the filter just doesn't seem to apply
This is honestly one of the best feedback tools I've used, the AI categorization is scary accurate
The theme detection is impressively accurate, it correctly grouped all my scattered login complaints
Whoever designed the onboarding flow deserves a raise, seriously smooth experience
I was skeptical about AI-generated summaries but this one actually nailed the key issues from my data
Really appreciate how fast the CSV processing is, uploaded 2000 rows and it was done in minutes
The mobile app keeps logging me out randomly, happens like 3-4 times a day, very disruptive
Push notifications on iOS stopped working entirely after the last app store update
The Android app is significantly slower than the web version, takes ages to load the dashboard
App size is huge, over 300MB, please optimize this for people with limited storage
Can't rotate the screen to landscape mode on tablet, feels like an oversight
None of my saved searches are showing up anymore after the recent update
The search bar returns completely irrelevant results when I search for 'billing'
Search is case sensitive which is really annoying, 'Login' and 'login' give different results
Autocomplete suggestions in search are just wrong half the time
Why does searching for a customer name sometimes return zero results even though I know the feedback exists?
Really disappointed with how the recent price increase was communicated, felt very last minute
The new pricing tier removed a feature we relied on daily without any warning in advance
Billing invoices don't clearly break down what we're being charged for each month
Please add an annual billing option, paying monthly is a hassle for our finance team
Refund process took way too long, almost three weeks for a simple duplicate charge
Honestly this is exactly what our team needed, cut our feedback triage time in half
Great tool overall but the learning curve for the admin panel is steeper than expected
Docs are outdated, the screenshots don't match the current UI at all
Would help a ton if there was a getting-started video instead of just text documentation
The API documentation is missing examples for the most common use cases
Getting a 500 error every time I try to upload a CSV larger than 10MB
CSV upload silently fails if there's a blank row in the middle of the file, no error message shown
Uploaded a CSV with special characters in it and half the rows came through as garbled text
The drag and drop upload area doesn't respond on Firefox, have to use the browse button instead
File upload progress bar gets stuck at 99% even though the upload actually completed
Notifications settings page is confusing, I can't tell which toggles control email vs in-app alerts
I keep getting notified about things I already marked as read, notification badges never clear
Would like the option to snooze notifications during specific hours, like a do-not-disturb mode
Weekly digest emails stopped arriving about two weeks ago, used to get them every Monday
Can you add Microsoft Teams notifications alongside Slack? Our whole company uses Teams
The collaboration feature where you can comment on feedback items is really useful for our team standups
Would love the ability to assign specific feedback items to team members with due dates
Can multiple people edit the same dashboard filter at once? Right now it feels like it overwrites
Sharing a dashboard link with a client shows our internal admin notes too, that's a privacy issue
Team permissions are too all-or-nothing, need more granular roles like 'viewer' vs 'editor'
Accessibility issue: the color contrast on the urgency badges is really hard to read for colorblind users
Screen reader doesn't announce the chart data at all, makes the dashboard unusable with VoiceOver
Keyboard navigation breaks inside the feedback detail drawer, can't tab through the fields properly
Font size options would help a lot, some of the table text is really tiny on smaller screens
This is genuinely a great product but it is missing basic accessibility features that competitors already have
account management page won't let me update my email address, keeps throwing a generic error
Deactivated a teammate's account by mistake and there's no way to undo it or restore their data
Would like an option to merge two duplicate customer profiles into one
Profile picture upload just spins forever and never actually saves the new image
The 'delete account' button has zero confirmation step, way too easy to accidentally trigger
reporting is great but exporting a PDF summary of the dashboard would save me so much time
the weekly summary emails are genuinely useful, feels like having an analyst on the team
would be nice if trend charts let you compare two custom date ranges side by side
the bug leaderboard is a great idea but it doesn't seem to update in real time
feature request ranking looks off, a feature with way fewer votes is ranked above one with more
